content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 本季度的市场推广活动效果不佳，转化率比上季度下降了 百分之十五。预算使用效率太低了。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 张总，我们发现主要问题出在社交媒体渠道。我们投放的素材与目标受众的偏好不匹配。我建议立即将预算转移到内容营销和 KOL 合作上。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 同意。立即停止低效投放，给我一份新的内容营销方案，重点突出产品的独家技术优势，星期五前提交。

theme: 市场营销/业绩分析 - 推广策略调整会议

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 各位，下个月的一日是最终交付日期，但我们的人力资源依然短缺，尤其是前端开发。进度表已经滞后两天了。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我可以从 A 项目调拨一位高级前端工程师过来支持一周。同时，我们必须在下周内完成所有单元测试，不能再拖了。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，下周的重点是测试和 Bug 修复。请确保所有模块代码的质量符合规范，零容忍任何重大缺陷。

theme: 项目管理/进度会议 - 资源调配与风险控制

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 刘总，我们与供应商 A 关于原材料价格的谈判陷入了僵局。他们坚持每吨涨价 百分之五，而我们的底线是 百分之二。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 让他们知道我们已经联系了替代供应商 B，并拿到了一个 百分之三 的报价。给他们最后通牒：如果不能接受 百分之三，我们将立刻签署与 B 的长期合同。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 明白了，用竞争者施加压力。我们争取在今天下午完成谈判。

theme: 供应链/价格谈判 - 策略制定

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我们这次实验的晶体结构分析结果显示，催化剂的活性位点出现了意料之外的重构现象，这与理论模型完全不符。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 别急，我们需要排除操作误差。请复查所有温度和压力记录。如果数据无误，我们可能需要修改最初的反应机理假设，从头设计下一轮实验。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我会立刻检查原始数据。这也许是个突破口，如果能解释这个重构，我们将得到一个全新的理论发现。

theme: 科学研究/实验分析 - 结果讨论与假设修正

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 数据库服务器的 CPU 负载突然飙升到了 百分之九十五，用户访问速度急剧下降，我们怀疑有恶意爬虫在攻击。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 周总，我已经查看了日志，确实有异常的大量请求。我正在尝试启用流量限制和 IP 黑名单，但可能需要重启部分服务来清除连接。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 动作要快，优先保障核心业务的访问。在重启前，确保所有关键数据都已备份完成。

theme: 信息技术/系统维护 - 突发事件处理

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 客户的商业合同草案中，关于违约金的条款过于模糊。没有明确规定损失计算方式，这在未来会带来巨大的风险。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 马上起草一份附件，明确规定若对方未能按时交付，每天需支付合同总额千分之一的滞纳金，并设定赔偿上限。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，我会确保新的条款措辞精准，并且涵盖不可抗力因素的排除。

theme: 法律/合同审查 - 风险条款细化

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 张伟，你负责的华东区域业绩严重落后，距离季度目标还差 百分之三十。问题出在哪儿？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 总监，主要是竞争对手推出了新的低价产品。我正在积极推动捆绑销售和增值服务，突出我们的服务优势，争取在最后几周冲刺。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 服务是关键。立即提供一份详细的重点客户跟进计划，并加大对老客户的交叉销售力度。

theme: 销售管理/绩效评估 - 区域业绩改进

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 李会计，请准备一份详细的现金流预测报告，重点关注未来六个月的大额资本支出，我们需要为即将到来的新设备采购做准备。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 好的经理，我将把资金流入和流出分类，并考虑贷款还款的影响。预测报告中会给出多种情景分析，以应对市场波动。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 确保所有假设和数据来源清晰可查。现金流稳定是我们的生命线。

theme: 财务管理/预算控制 - 现金流预测

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 陈总，下周有三位核心技术人员提交了辞职申请，离职率上升趋势明显。我们需要立即采取措施稳定军心。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 马上组织一次高管会议，讨论薪酬和福利升级方案，并针对留下来的员工进行一次保密谈话，了解他们的顾虑。我们必须留住关键人才。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我会立即安排。同时，启动紧急招聘流程，填补技术空缺。

theme: 人力资源/员工留任 - 危机应对与人才挽留

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我认为这个新产品的包装设计应该采用极简风格，突出环保材料的使用，但市场调研反馈说消费者更喜欢亮色和复杂图案。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我们可以在极简的主体框架内，通过局部的高光或独特的纹理来吸引眼球。关键是保持品牌的核心调性，而不是一味迎合所有反馈。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 这是一个折衷的好办法。我将尝试用高级感的哑光处理结合烫金细节，既保持简洁又提升档次。

theme: 产品设计/用户反馈 - 包装风格定调

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 这位病人的肺部 CT 影像显示有可疑阴影，但症状并不典型。我们需要进一步的支气管镜检查来确诊是良性结节还是恶性肿瘤。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我同意。同时，我们应先进行血液标记物检查。在等待支气管镜结果的同时，启动多学科会诊，制定初步治疗方案。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，立即安排各项检查，并在病历上注明“高度关注，需紧急跟进”。

theme: 医疗卫生/临床诊断 - 疑难病例讨论

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 居民对新规划的地铁站出口位置有强烈反对意见，认为会影响交通流量和附近小区的安静。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我们已考虑到交通影响，但可能需要重新评估出口 A 的设计。我们可以考虑将出口后退，并增加地下步行通道，减少地面占道。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 请将这个修改方案在下次听证会上公开展示，我们需要争取居民的理解和支持。

theme: 公共管理/城市规划 - 社区反对意见处理

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 新员工的入职培训中，关于信息安全和数据保护的模块似乎不够重视，很多人未能通过最后的测试。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 信息安全是红线。立即加强该模块的培训时长和深度，并要求所有新员工签署《保密协议》确认已完全理解相关规定。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 明白了，我将增加一个强制性的模拟测试环节，只有达到 九十分 以上才能算通过。

theme: 企业培训/合规要求 - 信息安全培训强化

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我们下个月的新产品发布会需要一个有力的宣传点。我认为应该突出其“人工智能驱动”的创新性，而不是传统的性能升级。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 没问题。我建议联系几家顶级科技媒体进行独家专访，并准备一份详细的技术白皮书，强调其在 AI 算法上的突破。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 很好。宣传语要简单、震撼，能立刻抓住公众眼球，例如“未来已来，由 AI 定义”。

theme: 品牌策略/产品宣传 - 发布会主题确定

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 鉴于目前的宏观经济数据，我们预计利率将在明年上半年继续上升，这将对我们的高负债客户构成重大压力。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我们需要调整投资组合的结构，减少对利率敏感的长期债券敞口，并增加短期高等级公司债的配置来对冲风险。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我会立即更新风险模型。同时，建议对高负债客户进行一次全面的压力测试。

theme: 金融投资/风险评估 - 投资组合调整

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 本学期的学生流失率比去年增加了 百分之八。很多家长抱怨课程内容老化，缺乏实践性。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我们需要引入最新的行业案例和项目制学习方法。我将组织教研团队在暑假期间彻底更新三个核心课程模块。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 进度要快。同时，在新学期开始前，组织一次公开课来展示新的教学成果。

theme: 教育机构/课程开发 - 应对学生流失

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 现场施工进度符合预期，但检测发现使用的部分钢筋批次存在强度不足的问题，必须立即更换，否则会影响主体结构安全。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 马上冻结所有不合格批次的钢筋，联系供应商紧急调配合格材料。同时，对已使用的部分进行无损检测，确保万无一失。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我会严格监督更换过程。所有更换记录必须存档备案，并由第三方进行复核。

theme: 建筑工程/质量控制 - 材料不合格处理

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 这位重要客户对我们的服务满意度评价很低，主要集中在售后支持响应慢和问题解决不彻底。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 立即组建一个专门的“VIP 客户快速响应小组”，由资深技术人员直接对接。同时，简化售后流程，将问题解决时限缩短 百分之五十。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我会亲自去拜访客户，传达我们的改进承诺，并跟进第一个问题的解决进度。

theme: 客户关系/服务改进 - 应对VIP客户投诉

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我们监测到系统有大规模的端口扫描行为，这很可能是黑客攻击的前期侦查。必须提高防火墙的警戒级别。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我已经将所有非必要的服务端口关闭。同时，启用入侵检测系统（IDS）的最高级别告警，并对所有远程登录进行双重验证。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 保持高度警惕。一旦发现可疑连接，立刻进行网络隔离并回溯攻击源头。

theme: 网络安全/威胁应对 - 端口扫描防御

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我们对年轻消费群体的调研显示，他们对产品的环保属性和可持续性非常看重，愿意为之支付更高的溢价。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 这是一个巨大的机会。我们应该立即启动“绿色包装”项目，并公开我们供应链的环保认证，将可持续性作为核心卖点。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我建议在所有宣传材料中，加入清晰的环保指标，例如碳足迹减少百分比，以增强说服力。

theme: 消费趋势/产品定位 - 把握年轻群体需求

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好，我想看看我的电网里边的存钱还有多少钱，我能说我的地址行吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 您说，我试着帮您看看

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 东直门

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 东直门

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 对

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 您稍等啊，按照咱们这个信息再帮您看，别着急，对，怎么样能查到呢？您这边就省事了啊，咱这个入户叫什么名字呀，知道吗？嗯，再稍等，咱缩小一下范围看看，看到了一个，我对一下地址啊，有一个客户编号，这个客户编号是缴费的号，您需要拿笔记一下吗？需要记吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我现在躺在床上不方便。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 行，那我查吧，您就稍微的等一会儿啊，别着急啊。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 您好，请问一下？您好，我想问一下，今天给我发个短信，好像电表里只有三十块钱，我能跟您这提个意见吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您说。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 就是低于一百块钱告诉我，我这样可能就比较早一点能知道。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 行，那咱能调。您提供一下呼号信息，咱调整一下预警阀值，比如说低于一百块钱时给您一个提醒，便于您这边操作呀或者之类的，是吧？别太少了。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 行，您说一下呼号吧。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我给您念一下，客户编号一零一。您的诉求是想将这个呼号的阀值调整为提醒阀值一百元，行，也就是低于一百块钱的时候给您提醒，是吧？这样，我知道了，别着急了，行，明白。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 还有一个问题，就是我现在还剩三十块钱，这三天能盯得住吗？四十八小时呢？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您看呀，是这样的，我拿您呼号给您查了一下，我看一下您平常用电量。

theme: 0-1:03电力服务客服为居民用户提供线上购电操作指导的咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 您好，我需要买电，咱现在到什么地方去买？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我帮您核实一下，您贵姓，先生，如何称呼您？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我姓高

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 好的，您这边的话，买电如果有客户编号，您可以通过手机上或网上直接买电，也可以的。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我一直没用过，现在我不知道怎么用。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您看这边我帮您，比如说我一步一步给您指导，您这样购买觉得方便吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 方便，可以，那太好。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 行，没事，那咱一步一步来。首先您缴费的时候，应该有一个叫购电卡的卡票，您有吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 有，有。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 行，那您跟着指导，您看卡片上应该有一个叫做客户编码，或者叫客户编号，是十位数字。您把那个数字看到后告诉我。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 米哈游客服，请问有什么可以帮您？其实是这样的，我有一个原神的主线任务和这个活动冲突了，然后导致我没有办法正常把游戏进行下去，你们有没有什么反馈bug的专员，或者什么的？因为你们负责登记的客服应该解决不了我的问题。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 先生，请问您贵姓？这边该怎么称呼您呢？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我姓某。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 某先生您好，您可以提供一下您账号所绑定的手机号码，或者您游戏的UID吗？这边客服帮您查询。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 可以，可以，你说。UID是一零一四七九零五九，对，这是UID。电话你需要吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 这边的话，您提供UID的话，就不用您再提供电话了。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，好的，好的。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 这边客服和您核对一下您的UID：一零一四七九零五九，是吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 一零一四七九零五九，没错。

theme: 1:02-2:12米哈游客服处理《原神》游戏任务冲突技术问题反馈的场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你看你叫什么？这是那个店子？那个店子老板说了吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 嗯，先生，就是目前如果手机因为外力原因导致的损坏，是会因为外力原因导致过保的。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 可是我们没外力啊，不是他屏幕脱胶了吗？那也不是外力啊，我又没拿火烤。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 先生，这边也是可以由咱们门店的工程师帮您去检测处理，你看可以吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那你之前刚刚跟我说是过保了。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 嗯，先生，这边的话也是帮您核实了一下这个情况的。您这边的手机后盖是在咱们官方这边购买的吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 后盖？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 嗯，是的

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你去那个店里核实过了？这个手机是换过后盖的吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 先生，这边的话您可以在咱们服务中心帮您具体检测看一下。如果针对任何其他问题，咱们这边工程师会帮您协助处理；然后针对这个，就是手机摄像头有灰的问题，咱们这边工程师也有说明，可以协助您做一个清洁处理。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那我还想再问一下，就是我这个手机到底过保了没有啊？可是上面的保修日期还没有过保啊。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 嗯，这边帮您核实的话，就是手机如果是因为本身外力原因导致的，目前核实是已经过保的情况。

theme: 0-1:30OPPO 官方客服处理手机故障保修争议的售后沟通场景

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好，打扰您一下

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 您好

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好，先生，听得到我的声音吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 嗯，可以

content.speaker: Speaker2

content.speaker: Speaker2

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 嗯，对

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是这样的，先生，这个情况呢，我们接到您的诉求反馈之后，也再次去和工作人员做了一次复核，但目前我手中拿到的最终结果判定来说，还是比较遗憾的，和之前的判定维持了一致。您的这个整体导向确实有广告营销方面的导向，相关工作人员复核完之后，确实还是没有办法做对应的开放，这个确实抱歉。另外，我这边也看到了先生有反馈过一个点，就针对于您的稿件里面可能有一句话有敏感词百度，是吧？这个问题我也帮您问过了，只能说以先生您后续的实际投稿情况为准，您得尝试把这两个字去掉之后再做对应投稿，看一下能否通过。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 哦你好，哦你好，嗯，情况我了解了，谢谢你。那个正如你所说的，这个把百度这个词去掉之后是可以投稿的

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 嗯，这个确实和系统的机制有关吧，也只能这样说。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 呃，等一下，等一下，没错吧？呃，就是把百度这个词去掉之后是可以投稿的？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 好，那这边的话您不用担心，如果是这样的话，因为对于这一块，就是说三次以往订单审核都是驳回的情况，是需要您进行发货。如果实在发不了的话，我来给您反馈这个情况，因为我在跟您的通话页面没办法直接操作您这个订单的退款，所以我这边直接给您反馈到技术部门，给您备注加急要求完成这个订单的退款。我们的相关信息核实清楚以后会给您一个回复，一般是在线上或者电话的形式回复，预计在两到三个工作日。我这边给您备注加急要求电话回复，尽快回复处理订单退款，好吗？你这边及时留意。

content.text: 那预约明天上午十点吧，姓名李娜，电话一三八四五八三五六七八，狗狗叫团团。

content.text: 首次到店的顾客验光免费哦～验光会测近视度数、散光、轴位等详细参数，确保配镜准确。您想什么时候到店？我们门店营业时间是九点到二十一点，工作日和周末都营业。

content.text: 那这周六下午两点可以吗？另外想问问镜片有什么材质可选，我平时经常用电脑。

content.text: 押金可以线上交吗？另外你们能送货上门吗？我在中山区绿城小区。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 押金可以线上微信或支付宝支付～我们支持市区内免费送货上门，您周六早上需要几点送到？另外归还时可以选择上门取件，或者您送到门店都可以。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 周六早上八点送到小区门口吧，我周日下午五点前归还，麻烦上门取件。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 好的，已帮您登记四人豪华露营套餐，租赁时间三月十六日到三月十七日，送货时间三月十六日八点，上门取件时间三月十七日十七点～麻烦提供一下您的姓名和电话，我这边录入系统，稍后会给您发确认短信。

theme: 露营装备租赁咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想租一套汉服拍写真，请问有什么款式可选？租期是多久？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！我们有唐制、宋制、明制等多种款式的汉服，男女款都有，还有配套的发饰、披帛～租期默认二十四小时，也可以选择四十八小时，请问您想租哪种形制？拍写真的话，唐制齐胸襦裙和明制马面裙拍照都很出片哦。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 想租明制马面裙，我身高一百六十五厘米，体重五十公斤，选什么尺码合适？另外发饰是免费搭配的吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 一百六十五厘米选M码合适哦，我们的汉服尺码很标准，到店可以试穿调整～发饰是免费搭配的，会根据您选的汉服款式推荐对应的发簪、发带、披风，不需要额外收费。您想什么时候到店取？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 这周日上午十点到店取，下周一上午十点归还，也就是四十八小时租期。需要交押金吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 需要交三百元押金，归还时汉服无破损、污渍，押金全额退还～另外租赁费用四十八小时是一百五十元，到店支付即可。请问您的姓名和电话是多少？我帮您预留款式和尺码。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 姓名张瑶，电话一三五四六二一八九零一。到店后直接报名字就行吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是的呢，到店报姓名和电话即可～我们门店地址是太上街七零九号汉服体验馆，周日上午十点会把您选的明制马面裙和配套发饰准备好，试穿满意后再付款和交押金，祝您拍照愉快！

theme: 汉服租赁预约咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 客服你好，最近工作压力太大，经常失眠，想预约一次心理咨询，请问你们的咨询师都是专业的吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！请放心，我们的咨询师都持有国家二级心理咨询师证书，有五年以上从业经验，擅长职场压力、情绪调节等领域～请问您想预约线上咨询还是线下咨询？线下咨询有专门的咨询室，线上可以通过视频或语音沟通。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 想预约线上视频咨询，比较方便。咨询时长是多久？费用多少？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 单次咨询时长五十分钟，线上视频咨询费用三百元一次～我们有多位咨询师可选，比如王咨询师擅长职场压力疏导，李咨询师擅长情绪管理，您可以根据需求选择，也可以让我们帮您推荐。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那帮我推荐擅长职场压力的咨询师吧，想预约这周五晚上七点可以吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 好的，已帮您推荐王咨询师，这周五晚上七点有空档～预约需要先交一百元定金预留名额，剩余费用咨询前一小时交。另外咨询前会给您发一份简单的问卷，方便咨询师提前了解您的情况，请问您的姓名和电话是多少？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 姓名陈明，电话一三九六三伍四二三四五。问卷是微信发我吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是的呢，稍后会加您微信，把问卷和咨询链接发给您～咨询当天会提前三十分钟提醒您，若临时有事无法参加，记得提前二十四小时告知我们，定金可以退还或顺延。祝您早日缓解压力，生活愉快！

theme: 心理咨询预约咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我上周买的绿萝叶子有点发黄，不知道怎么回事，能帮我看看吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！绿萝叶子发黄可能是浇水不当、光照不足或通风不好导致的～请问您平时多久浇一次水？放在家里什么位置呀？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 大概三天浇一次水，放在客厅里，客厅光线不是特别好，通风一般。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 那大概率是浇水太频繁加上光照不足哦～绿萝耐旱，建议五到七天浇一次水，浇水要浇透，等土壤表面干燥后再浇；另外要放在有散射光的地方，比如靠近窗户但不直射阳光的位置，偶尔开窗通风。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，那现在叶子已经发黄了，需要剪掉吗？还有什么注意事项吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 发黄严重的叶子可以用剪刀剪掉，避免消耗养分～另外不要放在空调出风口或暖气旁边，温度保持在十五到二十五摄氏度最好。如果按照这个方法养护一到两周，绿萝应该会慢慢恢复，要是还没好转，可以随时再咨询我们。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 太感谢了！我现在就去剪掉黄叶，调整浇水和摆放位置。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不客气呢！后续有任何绿植养护问题，比如施肥、病虫害防治等，都可以随时联系我们，祝您的绿萝越长越茂盛！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 客服你好，我家宝宝一岁半，想报早教课程，请问你们的课程适合这个年龄段吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！一岁半的宝宝非常适合我们的亲子启蒙课程哦～课程主要通过游戏、音乐、绘本等方式，锻炼宝宝的语言能力、社交能力和动手能力，每次课程四十五分钟，家长需要陪同参与。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 课程是多少个宝宝一起上？一周上几次比较合适？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 每个班六到八个宝宝，小班教学能保证老师关注到每个宝宝～建议一周上一到两次课，这样宝宝能更好地吸收课程内容。我们有周末班和工作日班，您想选哪种呀？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 周末班吧，平时要上班。请问学费是多少？有没有试听课？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 我们有免费试听课哦，您可以先带宝宝体验一下，再决定是否报名～正式课程十二节课收费一千九百八十元，二十四节课收费三千六百八十元，有效期都是六个月。试听课需要提前预约，您想预约这周日上午十点的试听课吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，预约这周日上午十点的试听课，宝宝叫乐乐，我的电话一三六三二零三七八九零。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 已帮您预约三月十六日上午十点的试听课～门店地址是太阳商场二楼，到店后报宝宝名字和您的电话即可。试听课当天会有专业老师引导，家长记得给宝宝穿舒适的衣服和袜子，我们在门店等您和乐乐哦！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 客服你好，我昨天坐你们的网约车，现在需要开发票，请问怎么操作？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！开具网约车发票很简单，在我们的 APP 里就能操作～请问您是用手机号登录的 APP 吗？有没有找到订单记录？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 是用手机号登录的，找到了昨天的订单，但是没看到开发票的入口。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您打开 APP，进入 “我的” 页面，找到 “我的订单”，点击昨天的订单详情，在订单详情页最下方有 “申请开票” 按钮，点击后选择发票类型（电子普通发票或增值税专用发票），填写开票信息即可。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我需要开增值税专用发票，请问需要提供什么信息？发票多久能收到？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 开具增值税专用发票需要提供公司名称、纳税人识别号、地址、电话、开户行及账号～填写完信息后，我们会在三个工作日内开具并发送到您填写的邮箱里，您可以留意一下邮箱通知。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，我现在就去操作，要是还有问题可以再问你吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 当然可以呀！如果操作过程中遇到任何问题，或者发票开具后需要修改信息，都可以随时联系我们～另外电子发票的有效期是三十天，建议您及时申请，祝您生活愉快！

theme: 网约车发票开具咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我上周送洗的羊毛大衣，取回来发现袖口有破损，这怎么处理？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！非常抱歉给您带来不便！请问您的羊毛大衣破损情况严重吗？有没有保留洗衣凭证？我们会根据衣物的破损情况和洗衣条款进行理赔。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 袖口破了一个约两厘米的口子，洗衣凭证还在。这件大衣是去年买的，花了两千元，现在怎么理赔？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 麻烦您先把衣物和洗衣凭证送到门店，我们会让专业人员鉴定破损原因～如果是我们洗烫过程中造成的损坏，会按照衣物的折旧价值进行赔偿，羊毛大衣的折旧年限一般是三年，每年折旧百分之三十。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那按照折旧算，能赔多少呀？鉴定需要多久？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您的大衣购买一年，折旧后价值是两千乘以（一减百分之三十）等于一千四百元，我们会根据破损程度协商具体赔偿金额，最低不低于折旧价值的百分之五十~ 鉴定当天就能出结果，您今天方便送过来吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 今天下午三点可以送过去，门店地址还是光明路那家吧？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是的呢，门店地址是光明路六六六号，到店后找前台说明情况，我们会第一时间为您处理～非常抱歉给您造成的损失，我们会尽快核实并给出理赔方案，感谢您的理解！

theme: 洗衣店衣物损坏理赔场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我是你们的会员，想问问会员有什么权益？积分怎么用？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！我们的会员权益包括：消费享九折优惠、生日当月送免费饮品一杯、累计消费满一千元升级为 VIP 会员享八五折，积分可以兑换饮品、糕点或周边产品，十积分抵一元，一百积分可兑换中杯拿铁。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那积分怎么累计？我之前消费过几次，不知道有多少积分了。另外 VIP 会员还有其他福利吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 消费一元累计一积分，线上线下消费都能累计～您可以通过我们的小程序 “我的 - 会员中心” 查询积分余额，也可以告诉我您的会员手机号，我帮您查询。VIP 会员还能优先预约座位、每月免费领取一张买一送一券。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我的会员手机号是一三七八四九三四五六七，帮我查一下现在有多少积分？另外生日送的免费饮品可以选任何款式吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 帮您查询到目前有八百五十分，差一百五十分就能升级为VIP会员啦～生日送的免费饮品可以选任何中杯饮品，包括招牌拿铁、水果茶等，生日当月凭身份证或会员卡到店领取即可。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，知道了，谢谢！那我再消费几次就能升级 VIP 了。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不客气呢！后续消费记得出示会员手机号累计积分，升级 VIP 后会有短信通知，祝您在店里度过愉快的时光！

theme: 咖啡店会员权益咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我上周在你们书店预订了一本《人类简史》，想问问到货了吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！麻烦您提供一下您的姓名和预留的手机号，我帮您查询一下预订图书的到货情况～我们预订的图书一般七到十个工作日到货，您是三月八日预订的对吧？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 是的，姓名刘敏，电话一三四五六七八六七八九。现在已经过去七天了，应该快到了吧？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 帮您查询到，您预订的《人类简史》已经到货啦！我们昨天刚收到货，正准备给您发通知～请问您想什么时候到店取书？门店营业时间是九点到二十一点，支持异地取货或快递配送。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我明天下午五点到店取，需要带什么凭证吗？另外如果没时间取，快递配送要收费吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 到店取书带您的身份证或预留手机号即可～快递配送同城免费，异地需支付十元运费，配送时间两到三天。您明天到店前可以先联系我们确认库存，避免跑空。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，明天我直接过去取，谢谢！

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不客气呢！已帮您备注到店取书，图书会为您预留七天，祝您阅读愉快！如果后续有其他图书想预订，也可以随时联系我们。

theme: 书店预订图书到货查询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 客服你好，我报的私教课程还有十节课没上，最近要出差两个月，想暂停课程，请问可以吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！私教课程支持暂停服务，每次暂停最长可暂停三个月，每年最多暂停两次～请问您的出差时间是从什么时候到什么时候？需要提供什么证明吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 出差时间是三月二十日到五月二十日，刚好两个月，需要提供出差证明吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不需要提供出差证明哦，只要告知暂停时间即可～麻烦提供一下您的会员卡号和姓名，我帮您登记暂停。暂停期间课程有效期会顺延，回来后可以继续上课，需要提前一天联系教练预约。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 会员卡号是八八六六六六二三，姓名赵宇。另外回来后如果想调整上课时间，比如从晚上改成上午，可以吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 可以的呢！回来后您可以直接联系您的私教，协商调整上课时间，教练会根据您的时间和自身档期安排～已帮您登记三月二十日到五月二十日暂停课程，稍后会给您发确认短信，祝您出差顺利！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，谢谢！回来后我会联系教练预约上课。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不客气呢！后续有任何课程相关问题，比如续课、更换教练等，都可以随时联系我们，祝您生活愉快！

theme: 健身房私教课程调整场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我昨天在你们店做的美甲，今天指甲上的钻就掉了两颗，还翘边了，这也太不持久了吧？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！非常抱歉给您带来不好的体验！美甲钻脱落和翘边可能是因为粘胶没干透或日常护理不当～请问您昨天做完后有没有等粘胶完全干透？有没有做重活或接触热水？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 昨天做完等了二十分钟，店家说可以走了，我回去后也没做重活，就是洗了个脸，接触了一点温水，怎么就掉了？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 非常抱歉，可能是粘胶涂抹不均匀导致的～我们支持七天内免费修补服务，您可以今天或明天到店，我们帮您重新粘钻并加固指甲边缘，确保这次能保持一个月以上。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 今天下午四点可以吗？另外这次修补能保证不会再掉了吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 今天下午四点没问题，已帮您预留修补名额～这次我们会用更好的粘胶，涂抹更均匀，修补后会让您等三十分钟确保干透，还会给您一瓶加固液，回家后可以涂抹在指甲边缘，延长保持时间。如果再出现脱落情况，十五天内可以免费再次修补。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，那我今天下午四点过去，地址还是银泰商场四楼吧？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是的呢，地址是银泰商场四楼美甲区，到店后找前台说明情况即可～再次为给您带来的不便道歉，我们会加强服务质量管控，确保后续不会出现类似问题，感谢您的理解！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我刚点的奶茶，喝起来有股酸味，而且珍珠都是硬的，这怎么回事？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！非常抱歉给您带来不好的体验！奶茶有酸味可能是原料不新鲜，珍珠过硬可能是煮制时间不足～请问您点的是什么饮品？订单号是多少？我这边核实后给您重新做一杯或全额退款。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 点的是珍珠奶茶，少糖少冰，订单号是八七六六三四八二一，刚拿到手没几分钟，还没怎么喝。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 已核实您的订单，确实是我们的问题，非常抱歉！我们现在马上给您重新做一杯，保证原料新鲜、珍珠软糯，您可以选择到店自取或我们免费配送上门，另外再送您一张买一送一券作为补偿。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我现在就在店门口，直接重新做一杯吧，麻烦快点，谢谢！

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 好的，马上为您制作，五分钟内就能做好～您稍等一下，我现在去跟后厨沟通，确保这杯饮品的质量，稍后给您送过来，再次为给您带来的不便道歉！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，尽快就行。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 没问题！这是您的买一送一券，下次消费可以使用～您的奶茶已经做好了，您尝一下，要是还有任何问题，随时跟我说，祝您用餐愉快！

theme: 奶茶店饮品质量投诉场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想预约下周六搬家，从阳光小区搬到丽景花园，请问需要提前多久预约？费用怎么算？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！搬家建议提前三天预约，尤其是周末，档期比较紧张～费用是根据搬家距离、物品数量、是否需要搬运楼层来计算的，请问您家有多少物品？有没有大件家具，比如冰箱、洗衣机、衣柜？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 物品不算多，有两个行李箱、三个纸箱，还有一台冰箱和一台洗衣机，都是普通尺寸。两边都是电梯房，不用爬楼梯。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 那费用大概是三百五十元，包含车辆运输、两名搬运工人、物品装卸，不含打包服务～如果需要我们提供打包箱和打包服务，额外收取一百元。您想预约下周六哪个时间段？上午九点到十二点或下午两点到五点。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 下周六上午十点吧，不需要打包服务，我们自己会提前打包好。另外车辆能停到小区楼下吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 大部分小区都能停到楼下，我们的搬家车是中小型货车，您提前跟小区物业说一声就行～预约需要交一百元定金，搬家完成后支付剩余费用，定金可以线上支付。请问您的姓名和电话是多少？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 姓名孙强，电话一三八六五二四九零一二。定金怎么交？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 稍后我把支付链接发给您，支付后备注您的姓名和搬家日期即可～已帮您预约三月二十三日上午十点的搬家服务，搬家前一天会给您发确认短信，提醒您提前做好准备，祝您搬家顺利！

theme: 搬家公司服务预约场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我三天前送修的苹果手机，换屏幕和电池，想问问现在修好了吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！麻烦您提供一下您的姓名和手机序列号，我帮您查询维修进度～苹果手机换屏幕和电池一般需要三到五个工作日，您是三月十三日送修的对吧？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 是的，姓名吴婷，手机序列号是 四八四九一二三四二五八七五六七八。本来以为三天能修好，现在还没消息，有点着急用。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 帮您查询到，您的手机屏幕和电池已经更换完成，正在做最后的检测，确保各项功能正常，今天下午就能修好～检测完成后会给您打电话通知取机，您今天下午五点后可以到店取。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 太好了，那取机的时候需要带什么凭证吗？维修费用是多少来着？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 取机时带您的身份证或送修凭证即可～维修费用是八百元，包含原装屏幕、原装电池和维修服务费，您取机时支付即可。另外维修后有九十天质保，期间如果出现非人为损坏，可免费维修。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，今天下午我过去取，谢谢！

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不客气呢！已帮您备注优先检测，确保今天下午能按时取机，祝您使用愉快！如果后续有任何维修相关问题，随时联系我们。

theme: 手机维修进度查询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想申请英国的硕士，需要修改个人陈述，请问你们的文书修改服务怎么样？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！我们的文书修改团队都是有五年以上留学文书经验的老师，擅长英国院校申请文书，会根据您的背景、申请专业和院校要求进行个性化修改，包括语法纠错、逻辑优化、内容润色，确保文书符合英国院校的招生偏好。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那修改需要多久？费用是多少？会提供几次修改机会？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 个人陈述修改一般需要三到五个工作日，费用是八百元每篇，提供两次免费修改机会，直到您满意为止～如果您着急，也可以选择加急服务，两个工作日完成，额外收取两百元加急费。请问您的申请专业是什么？有没有确定目标院校？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 申请的是教育学专业，目标院校是爱丁堡大学和曼彻斯特大学，不算着急，不需要加急。另外修改后会帮忙检查是否符合院校要求吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 会的呢！我们的老师会提前了解爱丁堡大学和曼彻斯特大学教育学专业的招生要求，确保文书突出相关经历和能力，比如教学实践、科研经历等～您需要先把初稿和个人背景信息发给我们，我们会根据这些内容进行修改。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，那我明天把初稿发过去，怎么发给你们？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您可以把初稿和个人背景信息发到我们的官方邮箱 liuxue@163.com，邮件主题备注 “英国硕士申请 - 教育学 - 姓名”~ 收到后会给您发确认邮件，告知修改进度，有任何问题随时联系我们，祝您申请顺利！

theme: 留学文书修改咨询场景

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想预约本周末的剧本杀，我们有六个人，请问有什么合适的剧本推荐？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！六个人推荐《来电》《市井狂人》《孤城》这几个本，《来电》是欢乐机制本，适合新手；《市井狂人》是爆笑推理本，互动性强；《孤城》是阵营对抗本，剧情紧凑。请问你们想玩什么类型的？新手多还是老手多？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 我们都是新手，想玩欢乐一点的，那《来电》合适吗？另外剧本杀时长是多久？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 新手玩《来电》非常合适，剧情轻松有趣，没有复杂的推理，时长大概三个半小时到四个小时～本周末三月十六日和十七日都有档期，上午十点、下午两点、晚上七点可选，请问你们想预约哪个时间段？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 预约三月十七日下午两点吧，费用是多少？需要交定金吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 《来电》的费用是八十八元每人，六人总共五百二十八元，需要交两百元定金预留场次，剩余费用到店后支付～定金可以线上微信或支付宝支付，若临时取消，提前二十四小时告知可退还定金，否则定金不退。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，那怎么交定金？另外到店后需要提前准备什么吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 稍后我把支付二维码发给您，支付后备注 “剧本杀《来电》-三月十七日下午两点-六人” 即可～到店后不需要提前准备，我们会提供剧本、道具和 DM 引导，建议提前十五分钟到店，熟悉一下环境，祝您玩得愉快！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我昨天订的鲜花，今天收到的时候花瓣都蔫了，还有几朵掉了，这也太影响心情了！

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！非常抱歉给您带来不好的体验！鲜花蔫了可能是配送时间过长或运输过程中挤压导致的～请问您订的是什么花束？订单号是多少？我这边核实后给您重新配送一束或全额退款。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 订的是玫瑰混搭花束，订单号是六五四七三二四八九，本来是送朋友生日的，现在这样根本没法送。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 已核实您的订单，确实是我们的配送问题，非常抱歉！我们现在马上为您重新制作一束一模一样的花束，今天下午五点前送到您朋友手中，另外再送一个小礼盒作为补偿，您看可以吗？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 可以，那麻烦尽快配送，一定要保证鲜花新鲜，别再出问题了。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您放心！这次会选择最快的配送方式，花束会用保鲜盒包装，避免挤压，配送前会拍照片给您确认～稍后会给您发配送单号，您可以实时跟踪物流信息，再次为给您带来的不便道歉！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，希望这次能顺利送到。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 一定不会让您失望！已安排花艺师加急制作，预计下午三点出发配送，五点前送达，祝您朋友生日快乐！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想购买一辆二手代步车，预算五万左右，请问有什么推荐？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！五万左右的二手代步车推荐大众 Polo、本田飞度、丰田威驰，这几款车油耗低、故障率低、保值率高，非常适合日常代步～请问您更看重油耗、空间还是品牌？有没有心仪的车型？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 更看重油耗和可靠性，大众 Polo 怎么样？年份近一点的有吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 大众 Polo 非常符合您的需求，油耗大概六升每一百公里，故障率低～我们店里有一辆二零二零年上牌的大众 Polo，行驶里程三万公里，车况良好，无事故、无泡水，报价四万八，支持小刀。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 价格还能再优惠一点吗？另外车况怎么保证？有没有检测报告？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 价格最多能优惠两千元，四万六成交～车况我们可以提供第三方检测报告，检测项目包括发动机、变速箱、底盘等两百多项，确保车况真实。您可以到店看车、试驾，满意后再付款。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，这周末我过去看车，地址是城东二手车市场 A 区十二号吧？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是的呢，地址是城东二手车市场 A 区十二号，到店前可以提前联系我，我帮您预留车辆～到店后会有专业销售为您介绍车况、安排试驾，检测报告也会给您看，祝您购车愉快！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我家孩子八岁，想学习钢琴，请问你们的钢琴课程怎么收费？有没有试听课？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！八岁的孩子非常适合学习钢琴，我们的钢琴课程分一对一和小班课，一对一课程更有针对性，进步更快～试听课是免费的，四十五分钟一节，您可以带孩子体验一下。请问您想报一对一还是小班课？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 想报一对一，收费是多少？一周上几次课比较合适？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 一对一钢琴课程费用是一百五十元每节，四十五分钟一节，建议一周上一到两次课，这样孩子能更好地巩固所学内容～我们的老师都是音乐院校毕业，有三年以上教学经验，会根据孩子的基础制定个性化教学计划。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那试听课怎么预约？想这周日带孩子体验一下。另外需要自己准备钢琴吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 试听课可以直接预约这周日上午十点，麻烦提供一下您的姓名和电话，我帮您预留名额～上课期间我们会提供钢琴，回家后建议每天练习三十分钟，如果没有钢琴，也可以先买电子琴过渡。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 姓名周莉，电话一三九六五四八三四五六。试听课当天需要带什么吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 不需要带任何东西，我们会准备好钢琴和教材～试听课当天老师会测试孩子的音准和节奏感，根据情况推荐合适的课程，您到店后报姓名和电话即可，期待您和孩子的到来！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想给办公室买几盆绿植，好养活、能净化空气的，请问有什么推荐？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！办公室适合养绿萝、虎皮兰、龟背竹、发财树，这些绿植都很耐旱，不需要经常浇水，而且净化空气效果好～请问您的办公室光照怎么样？是放在桌面还是地面？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 办公室光照一般，有散射光，想放在桌面和地面各几盆，桌面要小巧一点的，地面要高一点的。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 桌面推荐小型绿萝、多肉植物，小巧不占地方；地面推荐虎皮兰、发财树，高度在一米到一米五，适合放在角落～我们有办公室绿植套餐，包含两盆桌面绿萝、两盆多肉、一盆虎皮兰、一盆发财树，总价三百元，比单买便宜五十元。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 套餐价格挺划算的，能送货上门吗？另外后期养护有什么注意事项？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 市区内免费送货上门，我们会在送货时提供养护手册，上面有每种绿植的浇水频率、光照要求～绿萝和多肉七到十天浇一次水，虎皮兰和发财树十到十五天浇一次水，都放在有散射光的地方，避免阳光直射。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，那我买这个套餐，明天能送货吗？地址是创科写字楼十五楼一五零二室。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 明天可以送货，已帮您登记订单～麻烦提供一下您的姓名和电话，送货前会给您打电话确认～祝您的办公室绿意盎然，工作愉快！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，昨天预约的家庭保洁，保洁阿姨打扫得一点都不干净，厨房的油污还在，卫生间也没擦干净，这怎么处理？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！非常抱歉给您带来不好的体验！这是我们的服务不到位，我们会马上安排保洁阿姨上门重新打扫，直到您满意为止～请问您家厨房油污主要在哪些地方？卫生间是马桶还是地面没擦干净？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 厨房的灶台和抽油烟机表面都有油污，卫生间的马桶内侧和地面瓷砖缝都没擦干净，阿姨打扫的时候还挺敷衍的。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 非常抱歉！我们会对保洁阿姨进行批评教育，加强服务培训～今天下午两点安排资深保洁阿姨上门重新打扫，这次会重点清理厨房油污和卫生间死角，打扫完成后您可以检查，不满意我们继续整改。另外给您减免五十元保洁费用作为补偿。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 今天下午两点可以，这次一定要打扫干净，不然真的很影响心情。

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您放心！这次会派有五年以上保洁经验的阿姨，带上专业的清洁工具和清洁剂，确保打扫到位～稍后会给您发保洁阿姨的信息，上门前会提前一小时提醒您，再次为给您带来的不便道歉！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想申请美国留学签证，请问需要准备哪些材料？签证办理流程是怎样的？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！申请美国留学签证需要准备的材料包括：护照、I-20 表格、录取通知书、资金证明、成绩单、语言成绩、签证申请表（DS-160）、照片等～签证流程是先填写 DS-160 表格，缴纳签证费，预约面签时间，然后参加面签，面签通过后领取护照。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 资金证明需要多少金额？有效期是多久？另外面签的时候会问什么问题？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 资金证明建议准备五十到八十万元人民币，覆盖第一年的学费和生活费，有效期至少六个月～面签问题主要包括留学目的、所选专业、毕业计划、资金来源等，建议提前准备好相关回答，确保真实、流畅。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那面签预约需要多久？我想预约下个月的面签，来得及吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 面签预约一般需要一到两周，下个月的面签现在可以预约，完全来得及～您可以通过美国驻华大使馆官网预约面签时间，选择就近的使领馆，比如北京、上海、广州。如果您觉得自己准备不放心，我们也提供签证代办服务。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 暂时不需要代办，我自己准备材料吧。另外照片有什么要求？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 照片要求是五十一毫米乘五十一毫米的白底彩照，最近六个月内拍摄，不能佩戴眼镜、帽子，面部无遮挡～建议准备两到三张备用。如果后续准备材料过程中有任何问题，比如 DS-160 表格填写、资金证明准备等，都可以随时联系我们，祝您签证顺利！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 你好，我想报名瑜伽课程，之前没练过，请问有适合新手的班吗？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 您好！我们有新手入门瑜伽班，主要教基础体式、呼吸法和拉伸动作，非常适合零基础的学员～课程分早班、中班、晚班，早班七点到八点，中班十二点到十三点，晚班十九点到二十点，请问您想报哪个时间段？

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 想报晚班，十九点到二十点这个时间段比较合适。课程是多少人一起学？收费是多少？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 晚班是小班教学，每节课六到八人，老师能关注到每个学员的动作纠正～新手班十二节课收费九百八十元，二十四节课收费一千七百八十元，有效期六个月，包含瑜伽垫、瑜伽砖等辅助工具的使用。另外首次报名送价值一百元的体验课两节。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 那我先报十二节课的新手班，另外想问一下，练瑜伽需要穿什么衣服？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 建议穿宽松、透气、有弹性的运动服，比如瑜伽裤、紧身衣，方便做拉伸动作，不要穿牛仔裤等紧身不透气的衣服～已帮您登记晚班新手班，您可以从下周一开始上课，上课前会给您发课程表和门店地址。

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: 好的，谢谢！门店地址是朝阳路那家吧？

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: 是的呢，地址是朝阳路八十八号清心瑜伽馆，上课前可以提前十五分钟到店，熟悉环境、更换衣服～体验课可以随时预约，祝您练瑜伽愉快，身体健康！

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Well! Here we are.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Here we are. Aren’t we?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I should say we were. Here we are.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Well. How does it feel to be an old married lady?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Oh, it’s too soon to ask me that — at least — I mean. Well, I mean, goodness, we’ve only been married about three hours, haven’t we?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: We have been married exactly two hours and twenty-six minutes.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: My — it seems like longer.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: No — it isn’t hardly half-past six yet.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: It seems like later. I guess it’s because it starts getting dark so early.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It does, at that. The nights are going to be pretty long from now on. I mean. I mean — well, it starts getting dark early.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Your girl! Good God, what are you? Some puking college boy! Why, in time of war you could be shot for what you’re doing – for less than you’re doing!

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: To hell with you – there’s your story locked up in that desk! Smear it all over the front page – Earl Williams caught by the Examiner – and take all the credit … I covered your story … Now I’m getting’ out …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You drooling saphead … What do you mean – a story? You’ve got the whole city by the seat of the pants!

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I know all about that, but …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Listen, we’ll make such monkeys out of these ward heelers that nobody will vote for them — not even their wives.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Expose ’em, huh …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Expose ’em! Crucify ’em! We’re gonna keep Williams under cover till morning so’s the Examiner can break the story exclusive … Then we’ll let the Senator in on the capture – share the glory with him.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I see … I see!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You’ve kicked over the whole City Hall like an applecart … This ain’t a newspaper story – it’s a career.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Yeah … Yeah! But … wait a minute – we can’t leave Williams here … One of those reporters’ll …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: She speaks: yet she says nothing: what of that?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: ‘Tis but thy name that is my enemy;

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: What’s in a name? that which we call a rose By any other name would smell as sweet;

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: So Romeo would, were he not Romeo call’d, Retain that dear perfection which he owes Without that title.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I take thee at thy word: Call me but love, and I’ll be new baptized; Henceforth I never will be Romeo.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: What man art thou, that, thus bescreen’d in night, So stumblest on my counsel?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: With what, in the name of Heaven?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: My lord, as I was sewing in my closet, Lord Hamlet, with his doublet all unbraced; Pale as his shirt; his knees knocking each other; And with a look so piteous in purport, He comes before me.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Mad for thy love?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: My lord, I do not know; But, truly, I do fear it.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: What said he?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: He took me by the wrist, and held me hard; Then goes he to the length of all his arm; And, with his other hand thus o’er his brow, He falls to such perusal of my face As he would draw it. Long staid he so; At last — a little shaking of mine arm, And thrice his head thus waving up and down, He rais’d a sigh so piteous and profound, As it did seem to shatter all his bulk, And end his being: …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, every man of them, and no man here But honors you, and every one doth wish You had but that opinion of yourself Which every noble Roman bears of you.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: He is welcome hither.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: This, Decius Brutus. This, Casca. And this, Metellus Cimber.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: They are all welcome. What watchful cares do interpose themselves Betwixt your eyes and night?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Shall I entreat a word?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: (They withdraw) …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: (continuing) And since you know you cannot see yourself So well as by reflection, I, your glass, Will modestly discover to yourself That of yourself which you yet know not of. And be not jealous on me, gentle Brutus: Were I a common laugher; or did use To stale with ordinary oaths my love To every new protester; … then hold me dangerous.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I pray thee, sweet my coz, be merry.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Dear cousin, I show more mirth than I am mistress of; and would you yet I were merrier? Unless you could teach me to forget a banished father, you must not learn me how to remember any extraordinary pleasure.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Herein I see thou lov’st me not with the full weight that I love thee. If my uncle, thy banished father, had banished thy uncle, the Duke my father, so thou hadst been still with me, I could have taught my love to take thy father for mine.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well, I will forget the condition of my estate, to rejoice in yours.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I beseech you, punish me not with your hard thoughts; wherein I confess me much guilty … to deny so fair and excellent ladies anything. But let your fair eyes and gentle wishes go with me to my trial: wherein if I be foiled … if killed, but one dead that was willing to be so; … only in the world I fill up a place, which may be better supplied when I have made it empty.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: The little strength that I have, I would it were with you.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: And mine, to eke out yours.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Fare you well; pray heaven I be deceived in you!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Your heart’s desires be with you!

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: God save you, brother.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: And you, fair sister.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Can I not say, “I thank you”? My better parts are all thrown down, and that which here stands up is but a quintain, a mere lifeless block.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: He calls us back: my pride fell with my fortunes. … Sir, you have wrestled well and overthrown more than your enemies.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: What passion hangs these weights upon my tongue? I cannot speak to her, yet she urged conference. O poor Orlando! Thou art overthrown. Or Charles or something weaker masters thee.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: How do you do, Lady Windermere?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: How do you do, Lord Darlington? No, I can’t shake hands with you. My hands are all wet with these roses.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: They are quite perfect. And what a wonderful fan! May I look at it?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Do. Pretty, isn’t it! It’s got my name on it, and everything. I have only just seen it myself.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I am quite miserable, Lady Windermere. You must tell me what I did.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well, you kept paying me elaborate compliments the whole evening.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Ah, nowadays we are all of us so hard up, that the only pleasant things to pay are compliments. They’re the only things we can pay.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: No, I am talking very seriously. You mustn’t laugh. I don’t see why a man should think he is pleasing a woman enormously when he says to her a whole heap of things that he doesn’t mean.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Did you hear what I was playing, Lane?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Yes, sir, I think it was “Miserere” from the “Otello.”

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Why on earth did you pick that out, Lane? It’s the most depressing thing I ever heard.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well, you know, that is exactly why I chose it. That and “Nadir’s Aria.”

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You don’t mean to say you like “Nadir’s Aria”?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Not particularly, sir, but it’s so pleasant to have a melancholy theme that produces no effect.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I’m glad to say I have never seen a spade. Why on earth did you ask me to play one?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: The annoying thing is that the wretches can be perfectly happy without us.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Men are so very, very heartless. They know their power and use it.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: What stuff and nonsense all this about men is! The thing to do is to keep men in their proper place.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: But what is their proper place?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Looking after their wives.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: And if they’re not married?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: They should be married off in a week to some plain respectable girl … to teach them not to meddle with other people’s property.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I don’t think that we should ever be spoken of as other people’s property.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: All men are married women’s property. That is the only true definition of what married women’s property really is. But we don’t belong to any one.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Life is simply a mauvais quart d’heure made up of exquisite moments.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: All men are married women’s property.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: That is the only true definition of what married women’s property really is.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I don’t think one should take sides in anything. Taking sides is the beginning of sincerity, and earnestness follows shortly afterwards, and the human being becomes a bore.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Life is simply a ‘mauvais quart d’heure’ made up of exquisite moments.

theme: Miscellaneous Aphorisms / The Soul of Man

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Oh dear God in heaven! Ivan Vassilevitch! Such joy!

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I have the honour to ask …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Oh my dear boy … I’m so glad … Yes, indeed … you have always been like a son to me … God bless you both … How have you been, Ivan Vassilevitch?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I’ve been well … Honoured Natalya Stepanovna.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Why haven’t you been here for such a long time? Please sit down.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: No, thank you, I’ve had some already.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It’s cold … I’m trembling all over … I need steely determination. If I hesitate, I’m finished … Natalya Stepanovna is an excellent housekeeper … What more do I want?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It’s so strange to come back here alone. All of this seems empty now.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You look tired. More than tired. You look … defeated.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Defeated? Perhaps. I’ve acted on so many stages, and now the world doesn’t want me anymore.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You’ve given them your best. You deserve respect.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Respect doesn’t fill the emptiness in one’s heart. Not anymore.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Then let me sit with you a while. You don’t have to carry it alone.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Thank you … I forgot how quiet an empty theatre can be.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Oh, my dear Torvald, you must make friends with Krogstad.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: And why should I do that? Because he is one of my employees?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes — and because if you drive him out of the bank, he’ll do something desperate.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Desperate? What do you mean?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: He means to have his letter back … the one I gave him.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Your letter? What letter?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: The one I wrote him. But you don’t care about that — you would rather throw him over than save his honour.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: (laughing) My dear Nora, how like a woman …

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Don’t laugh at me, Torvald. I have something serious to tell you.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: What is it?

theme: A Doll’s House by Henrik Ibsen

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Peer, you are going off again!

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Aye, Mother, I must go.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Go! But oh, do not forget — there is no rest in your dreaming.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Dreaming? You think I dream too much?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, you dream of yourself so high, and all the time you are only a boy of the mountains.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Then let me be a mountain boy — or a king!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: A king? What do you know of king’s burdens?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Nothing yet, save that a king must venture, or else he is no king.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Venture, yes; but venture wisely, child. The world is not made only of the high peaks.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I will venture — and prove that even a dreamer can shape his fate.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Will the Mayor be good enough to undertake the task?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: In my communication to the People's Messenger I have put the essential facts before the public … From it you will see that the main result of the Medical Officer’s proposals … would be to saddle the ratepayers with an unnecessary expenditure of at least some thousands of pounds.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I have learned in the school of life … that moderation is the most valuable virtue a citizen can possess.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Discretion and moderation are what enable a man to be of most service to the community. But that would be the case here; and that is why I will see Dr. Stockmann damned … before I go with him in the matter.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Very well — let the meeting have its way.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: By the votes of everyone here … this meeting of citizens declares Dr. Thomas Stockmann to be an enemy of the people!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: My dear Hjalmar, I almost think there's something of the wild duck in you.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Of the wild duck? What do you mean?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You have dived under and got caught fast in the weeds at the bottom.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Are you alluding to … that I have within me an insidious disease, and you think I have sunk to the bottom to die in the dark?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Do not fear; for I will bring you up to the surface again.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well — that may be; but you should leave me alone … I am as happy as a man could desire to be, with the exception of a very natural melancholy.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You have a great deal of the wild duck in you, Hjalmar.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Teddy isn't in yet.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well, let us take that calmly. Let us go to the theatre as if nothing had happened, and tell him when we come back. Now or three hours hence: to-day or to-morrow: what does it matter, provided all is done in honour, without shame or fear?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: What did you get tickets for? Lohengrin?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I tried; but Lohengrin was sold out for to-night.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Then what did you get?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Can you ask me? What is there besides Lohengrin that we two could endure, except Candida?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Candida! No, I won’t go to it again, Henry … It is that play that has done all the mischief. I’m very sorry I ever saw it: it ought to be stopped.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Aurora!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes: I mean it.

theme: How He Lied to Her Husband

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: That divinest love poem! the poem that gave us courage to speak to one another! that revealed to us what we really felt for one another! That—

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Just so. It put a lot of stuff into my head that I should never have dreamt of for myself. I imagined myself just like Candida.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You were right. You are like Candida.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Oh, stuff! And I thought you were just like Eugene. Now that I come to look at you, you are rather like him, too.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Aurora: if Candida had loved Eugene, she would have gone out into the night with him without a moment’s hesitation.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Henry: do you know what’s wanting in that play?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: There is nothing wanting in it.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes there is. There’s a Georgina wanting in it. If Georgina had been there to make trouble, that play would have been a true-to-life tragedy.

theme: How He Lied to Her Husband

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Liar. You said you could change half‑a‑crown.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You ought to be stuffed with nails, you ought. Take the whole blooming basket for sixpence.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: [raising his hat] A reminder.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Ah—ow—ooh! [picking up coins] Aaaaah—ow—ooh!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: (throws handful of money into the basket)

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Eightpence ain’t no object to me, Charlie.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You hear this man calling me names?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: What else can he do, dear lady? He must defend himself somehow.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Some soldiers, I know, are afraid to die.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: All of them, dear lady.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Stop! Wait! … I daren’t! The very thought of it makes me giddy.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Give the alarm.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It’s no use: I give up: I’m beaten.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Come: don’t be disheartened.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You, the chocolate‑cream soldier …

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: A roomful of books? You have a library?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes. We have one, the only one in Bulgaria.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: How grand!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You once asked me why I did not write a Don Juan play.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: The levity with which you assumed this frightful responsibility has probably by this time enabled you to forget it.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: But the day of reckoning has arrived: here is your play!

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Its morals, its manners, its philosophy, its influence on the young, are for you to justify.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You were of mature age when you made the suggestion; and you knew your man.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Go on talking.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Talking!

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, they told me you were fools, and that I was not to listen to your fine words nor trust to your charity.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You promised me my life; but you lied.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You think that life is nothing but not being stone‑dead.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: It is not the bread and water I fear: I can live on bread; when have I asked for more?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It is no hardship to drink water if the water be clean.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: But to shut me from the light of the sky and the sight of the fields and flowers … to chain my feet … to make me breathe foul, damp darkness, and keep from me everything that brings me joy.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I want to file a complaint. I ordered a white t-shirt from you guys, but you gave me a blue one. What's going on over there? Oh no, don't do that. I just request a return. I don't want to deal with more staff today.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Hey, you can't say that to the customer. Let me handle this. Oh gosh. Hello? I'm very sorry you had to experience that, sir. I completely understand how receiving an incorrect item might be so disappointing. Please hold on for a second while I review your order. I'll review your details.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: You found it yet?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I apologize for the inconvenience. It appears we made a mistake on our end and we are deeply sorry about that. I can arrange a replacement to be shipped to you immediately.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: What am I supposed to do with this blue shirt then?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Yeah, you can keep the blue t-shirt from us.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Really?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Absolutely, sir. We want to express our apologies and make certain that you are satisfied.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Alright, well, since you're so sincere, I can't really stay angry.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Thank you so much, sir. I hope you'll enjoy your shopping experience. And feel free to contact us if you have any further questions.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Of course. You've been very genuine with me. I'll leave a good review.

theme: Complaint about wrong t-shirt delivery and replacement arrangement

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Hello, I'm Josh. Glad to assist you. How can I help you?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Hello, I'm calling you because my e-bike isn't working. We spent so much money on this item, and I can't believe it's really not working. Can you tell me what to do to get it started? It won't start. My e-bike won't start.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I'm very sorry to hear that. Could you tell me the last time you used it?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Um, about a month ago, because we had put it into the garage because of bad weather and haven't used it since.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I see. Since it has been a while, the battery has likely lost its charge. Can you check the color of the battery indicator light for me?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay, I understand. Let me take a look at that. Oh, it's not showing any signals. What should I do?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Okay, I understand. Don't worry, I know what the problem is. Because it hasn't been used for a month, I suggest plugging in the charger to an outlet, connecting it to the e-bike, and then trying to turn it on. This way, the battery can be recharged.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Oh, wow. Thanks for that. The signal light is now on. I think it's charging.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Great, I'm happy to hear that. However, please note that because it has been a while since your last use, we recommend waiting until the battery is fully charged before starting to ride to ensure safety.

theme: Troubleshooting for non-starting e-bike due to battery discharge

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Hello, thank you for contacting XYZ Company. How can I assist you today?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Hi, I recently bought a blender from your store, but it's not working properly. Can you help me?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Could you please describe the issue you're facing with the blender?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Sure. When I try to blend something, it makes a loud noise and doesn't mix the ingredients well.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: That sounds frustrating. Let's try a few troubleshooting steps. First, can you check if the blender's jar is securely attached to the base?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, it's attached properly.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Great. Now, please ensure that the blade assembly is tight. If it's loose, it might cause the blender to function improperly.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I just checked, and it seems tight.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Okay. Could you try blending a small amount of water to see if the issue persists?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I did that, and it's still noisy and not blending well.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I understand. It seems like there might be a defect with the blender. We can offer you a replacement or a refund. Which option would you prefer?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I'd like a replacement, please.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: No problem. I'll arrange for a replacement to be sent to you. Can you please confirm your shipping address?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Sure. It's one twenty-three Main Street, Apartment four B, Springfield, Illinois, six two seven zero four.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Thank you. Your replacement blender will be shipped out within the next two to three business days. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: No, that's all. Thank you for your help.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You're welcome. If you have any more questions or issues in the future, feel free to contact us. Have a great day.

theme: Troubleshooting and replacement request for defective blender

content.speaker: Speaker2

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I have one of your caged squirrel-proof tube feeders with the rainproof design. And I'm curious, can I get a replacement part for the tube feeder without purchasing a new one?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Well, in that case, we will need to verify with our warehouse if we have the replacement part. You mentioned the tube feeder, right?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, it's the feeder.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Because we only sell the complete feeder. But we can verify it. If this is approved, we can definitely let you know. But you will need to send us an email requesting this replacement. We can definitely contact you back by replying to the email that you send, okay?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: All right, that's fine. Thank you.

theme: Inquiry about replacement part for tube feeder

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Good morning, TMA International Company. This is Sol speaking. How can I help you?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Good morning. I'm calling you because I have a problem with my internet connection.

content.speaker: Speaker2

content.speaker: Speaker2

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Actually, it's been like this the whole morning and also last night. Can you help me?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Of course, sir. I will check what the problem is. Hold on a minute, please.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Hold on a minute, please. Don't leave this problem unresolved.

theme: Inquiry about no internet connection issue

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Uh, because I'm having trouble with my vacuum, it won't charge.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Okay, so how long ago did you get the robot vacuum? The purchase date was November the twenty-seventh, two thousand and twenty-three?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, the purchase date was November the twenty-seventh, two thousand and twenty-three.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Okay, um, are you next to the robot vacuum right now?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I have it in my den.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Okay, let's try and reset the robot vacuum—sometimes that actually works. So, um, first take the robot vacuum off the charging station.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: On the robot itself, there is an on and off switch. It should be green, red, or blue. You'll find it where the dust bin is.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Right, there's the button—it's blue.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: So turn it off.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Now, on the robot, I need you to make sure that everything is clean. So have a look and see if there's any debris on those parts and brushes. Also clean the sensors, contacts, dust, and...

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Perfect. Now, on the charging station, I need you to plug it back in—wait, is it already plugged in?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay, it's plugged in and there's a green light.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Now, I need you to turn the switch back on.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Perfect, now put it back on the charging station.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Excellent, thank you for your help today.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You're welcome. Thank you for listening.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Good afternoon, thank you for calling customer service. My name is Paula. How can I help you today?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yesterday I bought two of your cameras from Amazon, the nine fifty and the sixty. And the nine fifty is okay so far, but the sixty has such a low audio quality, so I want to return it.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I see. If you bought it from Amazon, you have thirty days of fair return with them. Did you try to apply for it with them?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, and they brought me to your side. They said to contact the manufacturer.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: I see. So you are out of this thirty days? I apologize for the inconvenience, sir.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes, but I'm not out of thirty days. I bought it yesterday.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: So we can check that with our team. You have two years of warranty with us, so there is no issue. We will need some details that you need to send to our email. Then our team will confirm if the device is defective, so we can send you a return label. Once the device is delivered to us, we are going to process the refund for you.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay. Thank you so much.

theme: Return request for camera with poor audio quality

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: How can I assist you?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yeah, hi. So I recently purchased one of your fire pit grills. I actually haven't opened it yet. So my question is, the salesperson told me that there's going to be a cover inside the box to make it a complete table, so you don't see the fire pit part the whole time. So if I give you a model number, can you confirm that before I open it? Because I might end up having to return it.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Sure thing, ma'am. Can I have the model number of the unit?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay, G-A-D.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: That's going to be the LP gas outdoor fire pit with resin mantle, correct?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Yes.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Based on the manual, ma'am, and based on this product, yes, there is a cover. There's a cover for it, ma'am.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: So inside the box, there's a cover?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Yes, ma'am. It's included inside the box, ma'am.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay, so it becomes a full table.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Yes, ma'am.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Okay, thank you for your help.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You're welcome, ma'am. Thank you so much. Have a good day.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Bye now.

theme: Inquiry about included cover for fire pit grill

content.text: Of course. Could you provide me with your account number or email address so I can look into it?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: My account number is one two three four five six seven eight nine.

content.text: I've been trying to make a payment, but the website keeps giving me an error message.

content.text: It looks like there's a temporary issue with our payment system. Would you like to make the payment over the phone?

content.text: I'll need your card number, expiration date, and the security code on the back.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You're welcome. Have a great day.

content.text: Thank you for contacting F*** Company. How may I assist you today?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It's been three days since my order was placed. Why hasn't there been any update on the shipping information?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Alright, gotcha. The lack of shipping updates may be due to your package undergoing customs inspection. This takes a bit of time. Just hang tight, okay? As soon as it's cleared, we'll rush your delivery.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Alright, please arrange the shipment for me as soon as possible.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Absolutely. I understand the urgency. I will do my best to expedite the shipping process for you. Thank you for your patience.

content.text: Hello, TechSupport Inc. How can I assist you today?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It's an iPhone fourteen, and Bluetooth is definitely on—I've tried pairing other devices.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Thanks for confirming. Please try resetting the headphones by holding the power button for ten seconds until the light flashes red and blue. Then re-search for them on your phone.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Let me try that... Okay, it worked! They're connected now. Thank you so much.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: You're welcome! If you have any other issues, feel free to reach out. Have a great day.

content.text: It's emily dot jones at email dot com.

content.text: I'd like to cancel immediately, please.

content.text: Done! Your subscription has been canceled, and you won't be charged again. A confirmation email will be sent shortly.

content.text: Perfect, thanks for your help.

content.text: The reference is B-O-O-K dash seven eight nine zero one, and I was supposed to stay from June the fifteenth to June the seventeenth.

content.speaker: Speaker2

content.text: HomeAppliance Repair Service. How can we assist you today?

content.text: My refrigerator isn't cooling properly—food is getting warm even though the temperature is set to three degrees Celsius.

content.text: I'm sorry about that. When did you first notice the issue, and is the condenser coil at the back clean?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: It started two days ago, and I haven't cleaned the coil in a while—maybe that's the problem.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: That's a common cause! Please unplug the fridge, clean the coil with a brush, and plug it back in. If it still doesn't cool in twenty-four hours, let us know to schedule a technician.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: I'll do that right away. Thanks for the tip.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: No problem! Let us know if you need further help.

content.text: I received my order ten minutes ago, but my fries are missing. I paid for a burger and fries combo.

content.text: I apologize for the mistake! Could you provide your order number and the restaurant you ordered from?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: The order number is F-B-D dash four five six seven eight, and it's from Burger Palace downtown.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Thank you. I've confirmed the missing shipment. We can either refund you for the fries or send them separately within thirty minutes. Which would you prefer?

content.text: Please send the fries—thanks for fixing this quickly.

content.text: That's acceptable. Please go ahead with the change.

content.text: Done! Your new flight is confirmed. A confirmation email with the updated details has been sent.

content.text: Great, thank you very much.

content.text: I apologize for the delay! Could you provide your order number so I can track it?

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: The order number is H-F dash nine eight seven six five.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Thank you. I see the delay is due to a logistics issue. Your sofa will be delivered tomorrow between one PM and four PM. We'll also offer a fifty dollar store credit as an apology.

content.text: That's better than nothing. Please make sure it arrives on time tomorrow.

content.text: We will! You'll receive a text with a thirty-minute delivery window. Thank you for your patience.

content.text: Perfect! Could you provide your student ID and the email used for enrollment?

content.text: Student ID is E-O dash five six seven eight nine, email is tom dot wilson at email dot com.

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Thank you. Your refund has been processed and will take three to five business days to appear in your account.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Great, thank you for your help.

content.text: Thanks a lot.

content.text: Yes, that would be helpful. Thank you.

content.text: I'll send it to your email. Let me know if you need anything else!

content.text: Policy number is T-G dash seven eight nine zero one, and the trip was scheduled for June the twentieth to June the twenty-seventh.

content.text: I didn't know I needed to calibrate it. How do I do that?

content.text: Press and hold the "Bake" button for five seconds until the display flashes, then use the arrow keys to adjust the temperature. Let it preheat fully before baking.

content.text: I'll try that. If it still doesn't work, can I get a replacement?

content.speaker: Speaker2
content.text: Absolutely! If calibration doesn't help, we offer a one-year warranty—just contact us with your receipt, and we'll arrange a replacement.

content.speaker: Speaker1
content.text: Great, thank you.
